title: Cox & Kings India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Cox & Kings India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, Cox & Kings India in Ranchi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Cox & Kings India:
Cox & Kings India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Event Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cox & Kings India!
